'''Abregado-san''' was the second [[Planet/Legends|planet]] from the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Anza/Legends|Anza]] in the [[Abregado system/Legends|Abregado system]] within<ref name="CCW" /> the [[Southern Core]] portion<ref name="Region" /> of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. It was a barren world, having a [[Desert/Legends|desert]] for a surface, and had no [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="CCW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Abregado-san was first mentioned in the [[2003]] sourcebook ''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'', a supplement for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' published by [[Wizards of the Coast]].<ref name="CCW" />
